quizQuestion:
Le professeur est surpris que je n'{___} si longtemps.
(The teacher is surprised that I spoke so long.)
sentenceTranslation: The teacher is surprised that I spoke so long.
explanation: aie parlé — subjonctif passé of parler with avoir. Formation: que j'aie (subj. présent of avoir) + parlé (past participle). Expresses a completed action viewed from the present.

quizQuestion:
Je suis soulagée que tu {___} tes devoirs à temps.
(I'm relieved that you finished your homework on time.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm relieved that you finished your homework on time.
explanation: aies fini — subjonctif passé of finir. Formation: que tu aies (subj. présent of avoir) + fini (past participle). The completed action precedes the current feeling of relief.

quizQuestion:
Elle est étonnée qu'il {___} une telle décision sans la consulter.
(She is astonished that he made such a decision without consulting her.)
sentenceTranslation: She is astonished that he made such a decision without consulting her.
explanation: ait pris — subjonctif passé of prendre (irregular past participle: pris). Formation: qu'il ait + pris. The decision was made before the present astonishment.

quizQuestion:
Il regrette que nous lui {___} la vérité trop tard.
(He regrets that we told him the truth too late.)
sentenceTranslation: He regrets that we told him the truth too late.
explanation: ayons dit — subjonctif passé of dire (irregular past participle: dit). Formation: que nous ayons + dit. After regretter que, the past subjunctive marks the action as completed.

quizQuestion:
Nous sommes heureux que vous {___} le voyage sans encombre.
(We are happy that you made the trip without any problems.)
sentenceTranslation: We are happy that you made the trip without any problems.
explanation: ayez fait — subjonctif passé of faire (irregular past participle: fait). Formation: que vous ayez + fait. The completed trip precedes the current happiness.

quizQuestion:
Je suis déçu qu'ils n'{___} aucun message d'excuse.
(I am disappointed that they wrote no message of apology.)
sentenceTranslation: I am disappointed that they wrote no message of apology.
explanation: aient écrit — subjonctif passé of écrire (irregular past participle: écrit). Formation: qu'ils aient + écrit. The absence of writing is a completed past state.

quizQuestion:
C'est dommage que nous n'{___} pas le lever du soleil ce matin.
(It's a shame that we didn't see the sunrise this morning.)
sentenceTranslation: It's a shame that we didn't see the sunrise this morning.
explanation: ayons vu — subjonctif passé of voir (irregular past participle: vu). Formation: que nous ayons + vu. After c'est dommage que, the past subjunctive marks the missed event as completed.

quizQuestion:
Je suis contente que tu {___} à la fête hier soir.
(I'm glad that you were able to come to the party last night.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm glad that you were able to come to the party last night.
explanation: aies pu venir — subjonctif passé of pouvoir + infinitive venir. Formation: que tu aies + pu + venir. Modal verbs use avoir in compound tenses; completed ability is expressed with the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Ses parents sont fiers qu'elle {___} son examen du baccalauréat.
(Her parents are proud that she passed her baccalaureate exam.)
sentenceTranslation: Her parents are proud that she passed her baccalaureate exam.
explanation: ait réussi — subjonctif passé of réussir. Formation: qu'elle ait + réussi. After être fiers que, the completed exam result calls for the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Je suis soulagé que tu {___} enfin le problème.
(I am relieved that you finally understood the problem.)
sentenceTranslation: I am relieved that you finally understood the problem.
explanation: aies compris — subjonctif passé of comprendre (irregular past participle: compris). Formation: que tu aies + compris. The understanding happened before the present relief.

quizQuestion:
Je suis étonné qu'il {___} tout le roman en une seule nuit.
(I'm amazed that he read the entire novel in one night.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm amazed that he read the entire novel in one night.
explanation: ait lu — subjonctif passé of lire (irregular past participle: lu). Formation: qu'il ait + lu. The completed reading precedes the present amazement.

quizQuestion:
Sa famille est soulagée qu'elle {___} les résultats de son bilan médical.
(Her family is relieved that she received her medical results.)
sentenceTranslation: Her family is relieved that she received her medical results.
explanation: ait reçu — subjonctif passé of recevoir (irregular past participle: reçu). Formation: qu'elle ait + reçu. The completed receipt of results precedes the present relief.

quizQuestion:
Je suis déçu qu'ils n'{___} pas assez de temps dans ce projet.
(I'm disappointed that they didn't put enough time into this project.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm disappointed that they didn't put enough time into this project.
explanation: aient mis — subjonctif passé of mettre (irregular past participle: mis). Formation: qu'ils aient + mis. After être déçu que, the lack of effort is treated as a completed past state.

quizQuestion:
C'est dommage que nous n'{___} pas trouver de compromis.
(It's a shame that we didn't manage to find a compromise.)
sentenceTranslation: It's a shame that we didn't manage to find a compromise.
explanation: ayons voulu — subjonctif passé of vouloir (irregular past participle: voulu). Formation: que nous ayons + voulu. After c'est dommage que, the completed unwillingness calls for the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Je suis désolé que tu {___} ton portefeuille pendant le voyage.
(I'm sorry that you lost your wallet during the trip.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm sorry that you lost your wallet during the trip.
explanation: aies perdu — subjonctif passé of perdre (regular past participle: perdu). Formation: que tu aies + perdu. After être désolé que, the completed loss requires the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
C'est remarquable qu'ils {___} autant de succès en si peu de temps.
(It's remarkable that they experienced such great success in so little time.)
sentenceTranslation: It's remarkable that they experienced such great success in so little time.
explanation: aient connu — subjonctif passé of connaître (irregular past participle: connu). Formation: qu'ils aient + connu. The completed period of success is marked with the past subjunctive after c'est remarquable que.

quizQuestion:
Ma mère est contente que je {___} la voir ce week-end.
(My mother is glad that I went to see her this weekend.)
sentenceTranslation: My mother is glad that I went to see her this weekend.
explanation: sois allé(e) — subjonctif passé of aller with être. Formation: que je sois (subj. présent of être) + allé(e) (past participle agrees with subject gender). Movement verbs use être.

quizQuestion:
Je suis triste que tu {___} si tôt hier soir.
(I'm sad that you left so early last night.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm sad that you left so early last night.
explanation: sois parti(e) — subjonctif passé of partir with être. Formation: que tu sois + parti(e). Past participle agrees with the subject's gender. Used after être triste que to mark a completed departure.

quizQuestion:
Je suis content qu'elle {___} me rendre visite la semaine dernière.
(I'm glad that she came to visit me last week.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm glad that she came to visit me last week.
explanation: soit venue — subjonctif passé of venir with être. Formation: qu'elle soit + venue (past participle agrees: elle → venue). Classic être-verb in compound tenses.

quizQuestion:
Nos parents sont soulagés que nous {___} avant minuit.
(Our parents are relieved that we got back before midnight.)
sentenceTranslation: Our parents are relieved that we got back before midnight.
explanation: soyons rentrés — subjonctif passé of rentrer with être. Formation: que nous soyons + rentrés (agreement with nous for a mixed or masculine group). The return happened before the current relief.

quizQuestion:
Le directeur est étonné qu'ils {___} en retard à la réunion.
(The director is astonished that they arrived late for the meeting.)
sentenceTranslation: The director is astonished that they arrived late for the meeting.
explanation: soient arrivés — subjonctif passé of arriver with être. Formation: qu'ils soient + arrivés (masculine plural agreement). After être étonné que, the completed late arrival uses the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
C'est bizarre qu'elle {___} chez elle toute la journée sans appeler.
(It's strange that she stayed home all day without calling.)
sentenceTranslation: It's strange that she stayed home all day without calling.
explanation: soit restée — subjonctif passé of rester with être. Formation: qu'elle soit + restée (feminine agreement). After c'est bizarre que, the completed action requires the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Je doute qu'ils {___} avant la fin du spectacle.
(I doubt that they left before the show ended.)
sentenceTranslation: I doubt that they left before the show ended.
explanation: soient sortis — subjonctif passé of sortir with être. Formation: qu'ils soient + sortis (masculine plural). After douter que, the past subjunctive marks the completed doubted departure.

quizQuestion:
Elle est surprise que vous {___} sans lui dire au revoir.
(She is surprised that you left without saying goodbye to her.)
sentenceTranslation: She is surprised that you left without saying goodbye to her.
explanation: soyez partis — subjonctif passé of partir with être. Formation: que vous soyez + partis (plural agreement). After être surprise que, the departure already happened, requiring the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
C'est merveilleux qu'elle {___} en bonne santé.
(It's wonderful that she was born healthy.)
sentenceTranslation: It's wonderful that she was born healthy.
explanation: soit née — subjonctif passé of naître with être. Formation: qu'elle soit + née (feminine agreement). Naître always uses être in compound tenses.

quizQuestion:
Je suis désolé qu'il {___} et se soit blessé pendant l'entraînement.
(I'm sorry that he fell and hurt himself during training.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm sorry that he fell and hurt himself during training.
explanation: soit tombé — subjonctif passé of tomber with être. Formation: qu'il soit + tombé (masculine singular). After être désolé que, the completed fall requires the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Je suis surpris qu'elle {___} du train à la mauvaise station.
(I'm surprised that she got off the train at the wrong station.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm surprised that she got off the train at the wrong station.
explanation: soit descendue — subjonctif passé of descendre (intransitive use with être). Formation: qu'elle soit + descendue (feminine agreement). Descendre uses être when intransitive (no direct object).

quizQuestion:
Sa femme est surprise qu'il {___} jusqu'au dernier étage à pied.
(His wife is surprised that he walked up to the top floor.)
sentenceTranslation: His wife is surprised that he walked up to the top floor.
explanation: soit monté — subjonctif passé of monter (intransitive use with être). Formation: qu'il soit + monté (masculine singular). When monter has no direct object it uses être.

quizQuestion:
Mon médecin est content que je {___} tôt ce matin pour l'examen.
(My doctor is glad that I got up early this morning for the examination.)
sentenceTranslation: My doctor is glad that I got up early this morning for the examination.
explanation: me sois levé(e) — subjonctif passé of se lever. Formation: que je me sois + levé(e). Pronominal verbs use être; the reflexive pronoun me stays with the subject. Past participle agrees with subject gender.

quizQuestion:
Sa mère s'étonne qu'elle {___} aussi vite ce matin.
(Her mother is amazed that she got dressed so quickly this morning.)
sentenceTranslation: Her mother is amazed that she got dressed so quickly this morning.
explanation: se soit habillée — subjonctif passé of s'habiller. Formation: qu'elle se soit + habillée (feminine agreement). The completed dressing action is viewed from the present amazement.

quizQuestion:
Nos voisins sont choqués que nous {___} si tard hier soir.
(Our neighbours are shocked that we went to bed so late last night.)
sentenceTranslation: Our neighbours are shocked that we went to bed so late last night.
explanation: nous soyons couchés — subjonctif passé of se coucher. Formation: que nous nous soyons + couchés (masculine/mixed plural). After être choqués que, the completed bedtime requires the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Je suis surpris qu'il {___} dans ses calculs.
(I am surprised that he made a mistake in his calculations.)
sentenceTranslation: I am surprised that he made a mistake in his calculations.
explanation: se soit trompé — subjonctif passé of se tromper. Formation: qu'il se soit + trompé (masculine singular). The error is a completed event prior to the present surprise.

quizQuestion:
Je suis ravi qu'elle {___} de notre anniversaire de mariage.
(I'm delighted that she remembered our wedding anniversary.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm delighted that she remembered our wedding anniversary.
explanation: se soit souvenue — subjonctif passé of se souvenir. Formation: qu'elle se soit + souvenue (feminine: souvenue). Se souvenir always uses être in compound tenses and the past participle agrees with subject gender.

quizQuestion:
C'est une chance qu'ils {___} après tant d'années.
(It's fortunate that they found each other again after so many years.)
sentenceTranslation: It's fortunate that they found each other again after so many years.
explanation: se soient retrouvés — subjonctif passé of se retrouver. Formation: qu'ils se soient + retrouvés (masculine plural). After c'est une chance que, the completed reunion calls for the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Je suis content que tu {___} suffisamment avant l'opération.
(I'm glad that you rested enough before the operation.)
sentenceTranslation: I'm glad that you rested enough before the operation.
explanation: te sois reposé(e) — subjonctif passé of se reposer. Formation: que tu te sois + reposé(e). The rest is a completed action before the surgery; emotion trigger être content que demands the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Il est surprenant que nous {___} si vite au décalage horaire.
(It's surprising that we got used to the jet lag so quickly.)
sentenceTranslation: It's surprising that we got used to the jet lag so quickly.
explanation: nous soyons habitués — subjonctif passé of s'habituer. Formation: que nous nous soyons + habitués. After il est surprenant que, the completed adaptation uses the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Nos hôtes sont ravis que nous {___} lors de la soirée.
(Our hosts are delighted that we had a great time at the party.)
sentenceTranslation: Our hosts are delighted that we had a great time at the party.
explanation: nous soyons bien amusés — subjonctif passé of s'amuser. Formation: que nous nous soyons + amusés. Pronominal verb with être; past participle agrees with nous (masculine/mixed plural). The fun is a completed event.

quizQuestion:
Il est inquiet qu'elle {___} sans prendre son médicament.
(He is worried that she fell asleep without taking her medication.)
sentenceTranslation: He is worried that she fell asleep without taking her medication.
explanation: se soit endormie — subjonctif passé of s'endormir. Formation: qu'elle se soit + endormie (feminine). After être inquiet que, the completed falling asleep requires the past subjunctive.

quizQuestion:
Le professeur est heureux qu'ils {___} au cours de phonétique.
(The teacher is happy that they enrolled in the phonetics course.)
sentenceTranslation: The teacher is happy that they enrolled in the phonetics course.
explanation: se soient inscrits — subjonctif passé of s'inscrire (irregular past participle: inscrit). Formation: qu'ils se soient + inscrits (masculine plural). After être heureux que, the completed enrollment requires the past subjunctive.
